title: paeonia mascula var. broteri
intro: Paeonia mascula var. broteri, also known as the Portuguese peony or Pink Monk's Hood, is a variety of flowering plant in the peony genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula var. broteri include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
